title: Trump’s threat to hit Iran 'extremely hard' jolts global stocks, bonds and oil
summary_full: Investor sentiment quickly soured as Trump's speech went on, sending assets across the board lower in international markets.
summary_public: Investor sentiment quickly soured as Trump's speech went on, sending assets across the board lower in international markets.
